title: Ukrainian drones hit Moscow and surrounding area, killing three
summary_full: The attack, the largest and most deadly on Russia's capital region since the invasion of Ukraine in 2022, showed Kyiv’s increasing ability to carry out long-range strikes.
summary_public: The attack, the largest and most deadly on Russia's capital region since the invasion of Ukraine in 2022, showed Kyiv’s increasing ability to carry out long-range strikes.

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: Kyiv’s increasing ability to carry out long-range strikes
